title: WinMint Agent Progress Event (JSONL line)
description: One JSON object per line appended to WinMintAgent-events.jsonl by Write-AgentEvent during FirstLogon agent runs. Diagnostic-only; not a build contract like BuildProfile or state.json.

type.description: Event category, e.g. step, user, demo, run

status.description: Step or notice status (pending, running, ok, failed, skipped, retryable, needsReboot, info, warn, error, etc.)

step.description: Agent runtime step id when type is step
